message:
fix(mux): use pre-calculated dimensions for quick terminal panel

Quick terminal has fixed dimensions (width=viewport, height=400px).
Instead of waiting for CSS transition or measuring the element,
we now pass these known dimensions directly when creating the panel.

- Add optional initialSize parameter to Panel constructor
- Pass pre-calculated size when creating quick terminal panel
- Panel uses initialSize if provided, otherwise measures element

This ensures correct dimensions immediately and faster panel creation.
